news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.

news.title:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank fell 1.8% to Rs.61.82, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
Mixed technical signals and valuation upgrade shaped a complex trading week for the bank.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank fell 1.8% to Rs.61.82, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% drop.
Mixed technical signals and valuation upgrade shaped a complex trading week for the bank.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank board to meet on April 25, 2026, to approve Q4 & FY 2026 results.
Trading window closed for designated persons under insider trading rules till the announcement.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank board to meet on April 25, 2026, to approve Q4 & FY 2026 results.
Trading window closed for designated persons under insider trading rules till the announcement.

news.title: IDFC First Bank identifies four employees linked to fraud at Chhattisgarh branch.
news.summary: IDFC First Bank identifies four employees linked to fraud at Chhattisgarh branch.

news.title:
IDFC FIRST CEO confirms Q4 profit despite full Haryana fraud impact.
Credit costs expected to drop below 2% next year as MFI impact eases.
news.summary:
IDFC FIRST CEO confirms Q4 profit despite full Haryana fraud impact.
Credit costs expected to drop below 2% next year as MFI impact eases.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank expects FY27 as a breakthrough year despite a ₹600 crore fraud hit, maintaining profitability.
Bank reports strong core operations, stable deposits, easing credit costs, and steady 20% loan growth amid cautious macro monitoring.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank expects FY27 as a breakthrough year despite a ₹600 crore fraud hit, maintaining profitability.
Bank reports strong core operations, stable deposits, easing credit costs, and steady 20% loan growth amid cautious macro monitoring.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank filed a police complaint after Panchkula municipal corporation flagged ₹150 cr FD discrepancies.
The bank initiated a reconciliation process and cooperated fully with authorities; IDFC First Bank also faced a ₹597 cr fraud case.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank filed a police complaint after Panchkula municipal corporation flagged ₹150 cr FD discrepancies.
The bank initiated a reconciliation process and cooperated fully with authorities; IDFC First Bank also faced a ₹597 cr fraud case.

news.title:
Former IDFC First Bank employees accused of diverting funds via shell firms.
Funds allegedly routed to Smart City Project, CREST officials, court informed.
news.summary:
Former IDFC First Bank employees accused of diverting funds via shell firms.
Funds allegedly routed to Smart City Project, CREST officials, court informed.

news.title: IDFC First Bank allots 4.9 lakh equity shares under ESOS.
news.summary: IDFC First Bank allots 4.9 lakh equity shares under ESOS.

news.title:
IDFC First faces ₹780-cr fraud involving Haryana govt, Chandigarh MC funds.
12 arrests made in major scam linked to city branch operations.
news.summary:
IDFC First faces ₹780-cr fraud involving Haryana govt, Chandigarh MC funds.
12 arrests made in major scam linked to city branch operations.

news.title:
Investigators uncovered a Rs 590 crore scam at IDFC First Bank involving fake companies and manipulated transactions.
Accused diverted government funds using forged memos, fake statements, and unauthorized departmental transfers.
news.summary:
Investigators uncovered a Rs 590 crore scam at IDFC First Bank involving fake companies and manipulated transactions.
Accused diverted government funds using forged memos, fake statements, and unauthorized departmental transfers.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank shifts from expensive to fair valuation amid price correction.
Investors reassess its price based on mixed financials and market benchmarks.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank shifts from expensive to fair valuation amid price correction.
Investors reassess its price based on mixed financials and market benchmarks.

news.title:
EOW registers FIR over Rs 75cr transaction irregularities linked to IDFC First Bank.
Complaint lodged by CREST highlights alleged mismatch in the transactions.
news.summary:
EOW registers FIR over Rs 75cr transaction irregularities linked to IDFC First Bank.
Complaint lodged by CREST highlights alleged mismatch in the transactions.

news.title:
ACB arrests Ankur Sharma in ₹590 crore IDFC First Bank fraud.
Sharma, a Chandigarh resident, is linked to the alleged fraud case.
news.summary:
ACB arrests Ankur Sharma in ₹590 crore IDFC First Bank fraud.
Sharma, a Chandigarh resident, is linked to the alleged fraud case.

news.title:
ED investigates IDFC First Bank over fraud case involving fund diversion to gold and real estate.
Links to shell firms and small jewelry businesses uncovered in the investigation.
news.summary:
ED investigates IDFC First Bank over fraud case involving fund diversion to gold and real estate.
Links to shell firms and small jewelry businesses uncovered in the investigation.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank faces investigation by India's financial crime agency over alleged fraud.
Concerns raised about governance and operational integrity amid the probe.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank faces investigation by India's financial crime agency over alleged fraud.
Concerns raised about governance and operational integrity amid the probe.

news.title:
Economists foresee limited impact of imported inflation on CPI due to fiscal measures but WPI may rise from fuel price hikes.
Bank of Baroda expects 150 basis points WPI jump if fuel prices rise; IDFC First Bank highlights CPI's low imported component at 6.84%.
news.summary:
Economists foresee limited impact of imported inflation on CPI due to fiscal measures but WPI may rise from fuel price hikes.
Bank of Baroda expects 150 basis points WPI jump if fuel prices rise; IDFC First Bank highlights CPI's low imported component at 6.84%.

news.title:
ED searched 19 locations over ₹590 crore fraud involving Haryana govt accounts at IDFC First Bank.
The searches took place in Haryana and Chandigarh on March 11, 2026, as per sources.
news.summary:
ED searched 19 locations over ₹590 crore fraud involving Haryana govt accounts at IDFC First Bank.
The searches took place in Haryana and Chandigarh on March 11, 2026, as per sources.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank confirms claims stem from a previous branch incident, not new.
Bank commits to recovering funds and taking action against perpetrators.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank confirms claims stem from a previous branch incident, not new.
Bank commits to recovering funds and taking action against perpetrators.
